title: Gate every change behind an independent approval
description: No change reaches a regulated system without a recorded approval by a principal who is not the author.
body: Use when a change can affect a regulated system (deploy, schema migration, config change, access grant). Do not allow a self-approved or unreviewed change to merge or deploy. Actions: require the pipeline to verify an approval record exists, that the approver differs from the author, and that the approval references the exact change being deployed. Validation signals include a gate that blocks a change whose only approver is its author and a test proving the approval is bound to the specific commit/artifact. Risk boundary: deploying without a recorded independent approval is blocking, and production deploy is denied to the agent and routed to a human gate.
